Case# SFContentBlockerErrorCode.noExtensionFound

iOS 9.0–10.0DeprecatediPadOS 9.0–10.0DeprecatedMac Catalyst 13.4–13.4Deprecated

```
case noExtensionFound
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/safariservices/sfcontentblockererrorcode/noextensionfound#Discussion)

A Content Blocker extension with the specified bundle identifier was not found, or the bundle identifier specified an extension that was not owned by you.
